scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:server" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:ai"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:server && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:ai
scripts.install:ai: cd ai-engine && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev:ai: cd ai-engine && .\venv\Scripts\activate && cd api && uvicorn app:app --reload
scripts.start:ai: cd ai-engine && .\venv\Scripts\activate && cd api && uvicorn app:app
